session:
version: 0.3.10
name: osv-scanner-sample2/scone-osv-scan
predecessor: null

  - path: /etc/mysql/ca/ca.crt
    content: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
  volumes:
  - name: temp_volume
    path: /tmp
    update_policy: no_rollback_protection
- name: osvscan_image
  injection_files:
  - path: /etc/mysql/ca/ca.crt
    content: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
  - path: /etc/ssl/certs/tls.crt
    content: $$SCONE::osvscan_certificate:crt$$
  - path: /etc/ssl/certs/tls.key
    content: $$SCONE::osvscan_certificate:privatekey$$
  - path: /etc/ssl/certs/sos-ca.crt
    content: $$SCONE::sos_ca_certificate:crt$$
secrets:
- name: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MARIADB_CA_CERT
- name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
- name: osvscan_key
  kind: private-key
  migrate: true
- name: sos_ca_private_key
  kind: private-key
  migrate: true
- name: sos_ca_certificate
  export_public: true
  kind: x509-ca
  private_key: sos_ca_private_key
  common_name: sos-front-ca
- name: osvscan_certificate
  export_public: true
  kind: x509
  private_key: osvscan_key
  common_name: sos-front.sos.svc.cluster.local
  issuer: sos_ca_certificate
  valid_for: 11months 30days 3h 50m 24s
  endpoint: server
  dns:
  - localhost
services:
- name: dbmanager
  image_name: dbmanager_image
  environment:
    DB_UPDATE_INTERVAL: 24h
    LOG_LEVEL: DEBUG
    MYSQL_CA_PATH: /etc/mysql/ca/ca.crt
    MYSQL_DATABASE: osv
    MYSQL_HOST: osv-scanner-sample-maxscale-service
    MYSQL_PORT: '3306'
    MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: $$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$
    OSV_CA_CERT_PATH: /etc/ssl/certs/GTS_Root_R1.pem
    OSV_ECOSYSTEMS_LIST: https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=13pWY7NT2kRs9InHrzneB6lkR9thJyLxL
    OSV_HTTP_TIMEOUT: 10m
    SCONE_FSPF_UPDATE_POLICY: on-exit
    SCONE_SYNC_FSPF_TAG_WITH_CAS: '0'
  command: /bin/osvdbmanager
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
  attestation:
  - mrenclave:
    - ccfbba9c7d1508aca0dea3e02fee2ef22e597812ba90d68548235fcd476b3a39
- name: osvscan
  image_name: osvscan_image
  environment:
    LOG_LEVEL: DEBUG
    MYSQL_CA_PATH: /etc/mysql/ca/ca.crt
    MYSQL_DATABASE: osv
    MYSQL_HOST: osv-scanner-sample-maxscale-service
    MYSQL_PORT: '3306'
    MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: $$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$
    TLS_CERT_PATH: /etc/ssl/certs/tls.crt
    TLS_KEY_PATH: /etc/ssl/certs/tls.key
  command: /bin/osvscan
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
  attestation:
  - mrenclave:
    - ef2379655bddcf3c74f47f610bf2de897551f158b4eeaa5fb04ecd949ec2cea8
volumes:
- name: temp_volume
access_policy:
  read:
  - ANY
  update:
  - CREATOR
security:
  attestation:
    mode: hardware
    tolerate:
    - debug-mode
    - hyperthreading
    - outdated-tcb
    - insecure-configuration
    - software-hardening-needed
    ignore_advisories: '*'
creator:
  signer: |
    -----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
    MCowBQYDK2VwAyEAcKtAFLOMRitgqlXJgLRvctwmDlY+xowL6ed9nQDHbc8=
    -----END PUBLIC KEY-----
